---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a feature or improvement for a Godimas101 tool or personal project
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: Godimas101
---

## Which project?

- **Repo:** <!-- e.g. claude-usage-monitor -->

## What would you like to see?

<!-- Describe the feature. What should it do, and what problem does it solve? -->

## Why? (the "what for")

<!-- What situation would this help you with? Concrete examples land better than abstract requests. -->

## Have you seen this done somewhere else?

<!-- Optional. Links or names of similar tools that do this well. -->

## Rough shape of the idea

<!-- Even a bad first sketch is useful. UI mockup, config example, one-line summary. -->

## Anything else?

<!-- Priority, alternatives you've considered, whether you'd help test, etc. -->
